subject: GRB 021125: Radio Observations
body:
E. Berger (Caltech) and D. A. Frail (NRAO) report on behalf of a larger
collaboration:

"On December 8.03 UT we used the VLA at 8.46 GHz to observe the 2-arcmin
refined error circle of GRB 021125 (GCN 1714) localized by INTEGRAL (GCN
1706).  We do not detect any sources within the error circle down to a
5-sigma limit of 220 microJy.  No further observations are planned"

This message may be cited.
